    V

    validateShip() - Method in class Model.Ship.ShipBoard
    Validates the ship by checking: - Connector compatibility - Blocking of engines and cannons - Proper orientation of engines and cannons - Special rules for cabins, alien support, shields, and special cargo
    validCoordinates - Variable in class Controller.RealTimeBuilding.BuildingState
    Valid coordinates for component placement based on game level, key is the row i, values are the corresponding valid columns
    validCoordinates - Variable in class Controller.RealTimeBuilding.FixShipState
    Valid coordinates for component placement

    The view used to display the client interface and handle user interactions.

    viewVisibleComponents() - Method in class Model.Game
     
    visit(AbandonedShip, Controller) - Method in class Controller.CardResolverVisitor
    Visits an AbandonedShip card and sets the game state to AbandonedShipDecidingState.
    visit(AbandonedStation, Controller) - Method in class Controller.CardResolverVisitor
    Visits an AbandonedStation card and sets the game state to AbandonedStationDecidingState.
    visit(CombatZone, Controller) - Method in class Controller.CardResolverVisitor
    Visits a CombatZone card and handles the combat zone event based on the card level.
    visit(Epidemic, Controller) - Method in class Controller.CardResolverVisitor
    Visits an Epidemic card and processes the epidemic event.
    visit(MeteorSwarm, Controller) - Method in class Controller.CardResolverVisitor
    Visits a MeteorSwarm card and sets the game state to MeteorsState.
    visit(OpenSpace, Controller) - Method in class Controller.CardResolverVisitor
    Visits an OpenSpace card and sets the game state to OpenSpaceEngineDeclarationState.
    visit(Pirates, Controller) - Method in class Controller.CardResolverVisitor
    Visits a Pirates card and sets the game state to PiratesPowerDeclarationState.
    visit(Planets, Controller) - Method in class Controller.CardResolverVisitor
    Visits a Planets card and sets the game state to ChoosePlanetState.
    visit(Slavers, Controller) - Method in class Controller.CardResolverVisitor
    Visits a Slavers card and sets the game state to SlaversPowerDeclarationState.
    visit(Smugglers, Controller) - Method in class Controller.CardResolverVisitor
    Visits a Smugglers card and sets the game state to SmugglersPowerDeclarationState.
    visit(Stardust, Controller) - Method in class Controller.CardResolverVisitor
    Visits a Stardust card and processes the Stardust event.
